hero.name: Meysam Kiani
hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.subtitle: +4 years crafting fast, modern, and satisfying web experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A bit about who I am
about.bio: I'm a 24-year-old frontend developer from Tehran, Iran. I love building new things and I have a real passion for modern, elegant user interfaces. I believe that everything should work correctly and feel genuinely satisfying to use — performance and experience are never an afterthought for me.
about.bio2: With 4+ years of experience across personal projects, government-scale platforms, and startup collaborations, I've learned to write code that scales, performs, and delights.

skills.title: Skills & Stack
skills.subtitle: Technologies I work with every day

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Things I've built and shipped
projects.slicegames_desc: A personal online gaming platform focused on party games — built from scratch and scaling to 500+ daily unique visitors powered entirely by SEO, zero ads.
projects.mentorjet_desc: An online mentoring platform for Iranian users where I served as a core dev team member. Built with Next.js, with plans for international expansion.
projects.varzeshkar_desc: A comprehensive fitness platform for finding coaches and training plans across Iran, integrated with AI to generate personalised gym programs.
projects.23pixel_desc: Freelance refactoring project — after 200+ focused hours, I improved site performance by 114% and dramatically enhanced mobile responsiveness.
projects.sib_desc: A large-scale government healthcare system with 500+ features, 25,000+ daily active users, and health data for 80M+ Iranians. I spent 3 years here on-site, leading dark mode, migrations, and legacy browser support.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey
experience.journey_start: From self-taught beginnings in 2019 to senior engineering today.
experience.dapa_desc_senior: Leading frontend architecture decisions, mentoring team members, and driving performance and DX improvements across the platform.
experience.dapa_desc_mid: Joined DAPA to build and scale complex product features, bringing patterns and experience from previous roles into a faster-paced environment.
experience.vofour_desc_junior: Grew into a full junior role, taking ownership of features end-to-end and contributing to the core product over two years of focused learning and shipping.
experience.vofour_desc_intern: First professional role — turned self-taught skills into real product work within a psychology-focused tech team.
